title: Mike Coleman
compiled_truth: Mike Coleman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2001-11-21), Mike Coleman sent 16 and received 79 emails, totalling 95 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (9), [Robert Virgo](people/robert-virgo) (6), [Charles Weldon](people/charles-weldon) (6), [Ron Tapscott](people/ron-tapscott) (5), [Mark Breese](people/mark-breese) (5).
